author: gb9t
content: Iter 121 result: net/sched/sch-fifo.md (PFIFO/BFIFO/PFIFO_HEAD_DROP simple FIFO qdiscs - sch_fifo.c ~276 lines; pfifo packet-count limit + bfifo byte-count limit + pfifo_head_drop drops oldest TCP-friendly + qdisc_dequeue_head + __qdisc_enqueue_tail + sch.limit default tx_queue_len + leaf-qdisc for PRIO/MULTIQ/HTB/MQPRIO + per-overflow drop reason logged) + virt/kvm/x86-irq-injection.md (KVM x86 per-vCPU IRQ injection state machine - x86.c ~250 lines; priority order exception.injected > nmi.injected > exception.pending > smi > nmi > extint > apic + KvmQueuedException pending/injected/error_code/payload + nmi_pending capped + smi_pending + interrupt.pending ExtINT + inject_pending_event vmenter dispatcher + kvm_cpu_has_injectable_intr + kvm_cpu_get_interrupt PIC vs LAPIC + double-fault detection + triple-fault → KVM_EXIT_SHUTDOWN + IF=0/MOV-SS/STI blocking → enable_irq_window + nested_run_pending defers + vmcs.entry-interrupt-info-field + vmcb.control.event_inj). 192 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/sched/sch-pfifo-fast.md (pfifo_fast in sch-generic.md? pivot) + virt/kvm/x86-vmexit-handlers.md or pivot.
